methods.name: Pulse Active Ratio (PAR) Electrocardiogram (ECG) Authentication
methods.description: ECG-based biometric authentication method that uses the Pulse Active Ratio (PAR) as a unique biometric authenticator.
sources: @article{safieElectrocardiogramECGBiometric2011,  title = {Electrocardiogram ({{ECG}}) {{Biometric Authentication Using Pulse Active Ratio}} ({{PAR}})},  author = {Safie, Sairul I. and Soraghan, John J. and Petropoulakis, Lykourgos},  year = {2011},  month = dec,  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security},  volume = {6},  number = {4},  pages = {1315--1322},  issn = {1556-6021},  doi = {10.1109/TIFS.2011.2162408}}
